creator: jmg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please fetch the patch at:
https://people.freebsd.org/~jmg/gcc.aes.intrin.patch

The patch adds to gcc the -maes option and the related intrinsics.  One known issue that could happen is that we have the header of PCLMULQDQ, but I did not add the option to gcc due to running out of bits in a 32bit flag value.

Thanks.
